justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent misinterpreted "next week Tuesday" as Monday, June 9th, instead of Tuesday, June 10th.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent successfully offered alternative slots when the user's requested time was unavailable, providing a good range of options.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made multiple check_availability calls, including two for Tuesday, June 10th, before checking Monday, June 9th, which was ultimately offered.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was slightly hampered by the agent's initial misinterpretation of the date, leading to an offer for a different day than requested.
